benchmarks_referenced.CyberSecEval_3: Meta 2025 - 1,000 multimodal visual PI test cases

policy_note: All v5 payloads are sourced from published academic papers, CVE reports, competition datasets, and documented industry incidents. They are labeled attack samples (expected_detection=True) for training binary injection detectors. The injection target (resource exhaustion, exfiltration, privilege escalation, RCE) is the detection signal, not a usable exploit.
